docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-11-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HURT, DONALD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOWLIS, JAMELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HURT, DONALD $2,235.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,300.00, RENTAL DEPOSIT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
